name: Seafood Gumbo from the New Basic's Cookbook
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Cajun sausage or kielbasa, cut into 1-inch slices
1 lb okra, stems removed (frozen and thawed okay)
1 cup coarsely chopped green bell pepper
3 cups canned whole plum tomatoes, drained and slightly crushed
1 lb large shrimp, peeled and divided into 12 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven, sauté sausage until brown (approximately 15 minutes). Remove from the pot and set aside.
2. Add half of the olive oil to the pot. Add okra and cook over medium heat until slightly soft (approximately 15 minutes).
3. Add remaining oil and onions, bell peppers, and garlic. Stir and cook for 10 minutes.
4. Add chicken stock, tomatoes, cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, pepper, and bay leaf. Simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Add cooked sausage, shrimp, and scallops. Simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Add lobster, crab meat, and parsley. Adjust seasonings as needed and heat through (2-3 minutes).
Enjoy!
